data.name: YOGA SEX PRACTICE
data.detailed_description:
The game has a minimum of boring scenes and solid porn scenes. It will definitely not be boring.

In the game you will find:
- One-handed play
- Hot sex stories
- 5 hot girls with their fetishes
- Yoga class

Also, the game will have achieves and a gallery.

Hurry up and enroll in yoga class and start your sexy adventure. We are already waiting for you!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
